tags.name: endpoint_url
tags.documentation: MIRA chat endpoint URL embedded in the ChatDock view's Web Browser. Override per-gateway as needed.

tags.name: scan_api_url
tags.documentation: MIRA Scan backend base URL. The ScanWidget POSTs to <scan_api_url>/scan/extract.

tags.name: factorylm_onboard_url
tags.documentation: FactoryLM onboarding URL — opened from the upsell banner and the 'Add to FactoryLM' CTA.

tags.name: namespace_map_api_url
tags.documentation: WebDev endpoint for the NamespaceMapper view. Change to your gateway's hostname+port. Requires WebDev module installed (CRA-245).

tags.name: uns_enterprise
tags.documentation: UNS enterprise slug used by the NamespaceMapper to build ISA-95 paths. Example: 'acme_corp'.

tags.name: namespace_map
tags.documentation: JSON: aggregate UNS namespace mapping produced by the NamespaceMapper. Written by POST /api/namespace. Read by mira-hub and mira-pipeline to resolve tag→UNS paths.

tags.name: namespace_map_i3x
tags.documentation: JSON: i3X objectInstances aggregate produced by the NamespaceMapper. Written by POST /api/namespace. Conforms to CESMII i3X OpenAPI schema (elementId, typeElementId, parentId, isComposition, metadata).
